root_cause.text: Apache Shiro fails to correctly normalize and evaluate requested URIs against access control rules when deployed in a non-root servlet context path, allowing attackers to bypass intended servlet filters.
root_cause.evidence: The CVE description explicitly states that attackers can "bypass intended servlet filters and gain access by leveraging use of a non-root servlet context path."

agent_logs.root_cause_candidate: Apache Shiro fails to correctly normalize and evaluate requested URIs against access control rules when deployed in a non-root servlet context path, allowing attackers to bypass intended servlet filters.
agent_logs.evidence_points: The CVE description explicitly states that attackers can "bypass intended servlet filters and gain access by leveraging use of a non-root servlet context path."
